artPrompt: A vast living entity made entirely of murky reservoir water, a half-formed face rising from rippling sickly-green bioluminescent depths, rusted pipes and submerged litter dissolving within its translucent body, mist curling off its surface under a bruised stormy sky, the whole reservoir aware and stirring, eerie and tender, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: the water do be alive tho
text:
the water do be alive. it always were. you simply was not looking at the water.
this creature is become every body of water within forty miles, simultaneous, including the one inside you, do not think about the one inside you.
whenever anyone do anything, glug. (this is Feed but it forgot the rules and just goes glug.)
power and toughness is however wet the table feels. it is very wet. it is getting wetter.
flavorText: the reservoir cleared its throat and the throat was the whole reservoir.
